name: Spaghetti Sauce (Olive Garden)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Stewed tomatoes, (14 ounces) cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in oil until pink color disappears.
2. Crumble with fork.
3. Stir in tomatoes, V-8 juice, Prego spaghetti sauce, onion soup mix, and grape jelly.
4. Cook, stirring often, 15 to 20 minutes or until jelly melts and sauce is piping hot.
